diagrams.title: TCP Three-Way Handshake
diagrams.description: Shows the three-step process to establish a TCP connection with SYN, SYN-ACK, and ACK messages
diagrams.purpose: Understand connection establishment mechanism and sequence number synchronization

diagrams.title: TCP Four-Way Handshake (Termination)
diagrams.description: Shows the four-step process to gracefully terminate a TCP connection
diagrams.purpose: Understand connection termination and state transitions

diagrams.title: TCP Header Format
diagrams.description: Shows the structure of a TCP header with all fields and their bit positions
diagrams.purpose: Understand TCP header fields and their functions

diagrams.title: TCP State Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows TCP connection states and transitions between them during establishment and termination
diagrams.purpose: Visualize TCP connection lifecycle and state changes

diagrams.title: TCP vs UDP Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison of TCP and UDP protocols showing their differences
diagrams.purpose: Understand when to use TCP vs UDP and their characteristics
